scripts.build: npm run build-grammar && npm run build-compiler
scripts.build-compiler: npx tsx ../3E/index.ts Stage3E-ast.s3d > /tmp/_s3d_ast.ts && mv /tmp/_s3d_ast.ts Stage3E-ast.ts && npx tsx ../3E/index.ts Stage3E-lower.s3d > /tmp/_s3d_lower.ts && mv /tmp/_s3d_lower.ts Stage3E-lower.ts && npx tsx ../3E/index.ts Stage3E-codegen.s3d > /tmp/_s3d_codegen.ts && mv /tmp/_s3d_codegen.ts Stage3E-codegen.ts && npx tsx ../3E/index.ts Stage3E.s3d > /tmp/_s3d_main.ts && mv /tmp/_s3d_main.ts ../3E/index.ts
scripts.test: npm run build && npx vitest run
